comments.author: @muhamAli-g8r
comments.text: thank u for bringing Indonesia to the world❤waiting for your next video about Indonesia, it's awesome🎉

comments.author: @RemoteEarthJourneys
comments.text: The way you capture Okinawa isn't about checking off attractions—it's about making us slow down and appreciate the little moments. By the end, it felt less like watching a trip and more like remembering one. 🌺

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: Thank you so much for such a beautiful comment! My goal with The Planet Journal is exactly that—to help viewers slow down and truly feel the atmosphere of a place. I’m so happy to hear that this journey resonated with you like a personal memory. Stay tuned for more!

comments.author: @latifaanggrek
comments.text: your video about indonesia is amazing, i think you could use some clip for your video to create your thumbnail instead of AI

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@latifaanggrek 
Thank you so much for the kind words and the honest feedback! I’m glad you enjoyed the documentary. That’s a great point—using a real frame from the footage would definitely feel more authentic. I’ll certainly keep that in mind for my future uploads. Stay tuned!
